title: Mexicoa ghiesbreghtiana

The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its potential health benefits, including the treatment of hypertension, anxiety, and insomnia, attributed to its ability to reduce blood pressure and promote relaxation. The most common herbal preparations made from this plant include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are used to alleviate symptoms of stress and anxiety.
